lockedMessage: [FR] Trip Memory is part of Explorer (Plus). Upgrade to create a shareable memory when you finish a trip.
createToggle: [FR] Create a memory of this trip
hotelNamesPlaceholder: [FR] Add hotel names, one per line
notFound: [FR] No memory saved for this trip.
upgradeShareJournal: [FR] Upgrade to Explorer to share your memory card and keep a journal.
entryPlaceholder: [FR] Write a moment from your trip…
communitySectionSubtitle: [FR] Publish this completed trip to the Community feed. Add a tip and tags so others can discover your route.
communityTipPlaceholder: [FR] What should the next traveler know?
communitySectionSubtitleUpdate: [FR] Edit your tip, tags, or travel style, then tap Update Community. Your feed listing will match this trip’s itinerary and cover photo.
communityUpdatedBody: [FR] Your route on the Community tab now reflects your changes.
communityTipRequired: [FR] Add a short tip before publishing.

communityPublishError: [FR] Could not publish. Please try again.
